seoTitle: Set Up the HubSpot WhatsApp Integration (2026 Guide)
metaDescription: Learn how to connect a verified Meta WhatsApp Business account to HubSpot's shared inbox, pass Meta authentication, and automate WhatsApp messaging workflows.
intro: If you handle customer conversations across multiple channels, routing WhatsApp messages into your HubSpot inbox keeps everything in one place. This guide walks through connecting a verified Meta WhatsApp Business account to HubSpot, authenticating through Meta, and getting automated messaging templates ready to use.

steps.heading: Open the Inbox & Help Desk settings
steps.body: Head into HubSpot's Settings and find the Inbox & Help Desk panel, which is where new channel connections are managed.

steps.heading: Select the WhatsApp channel option
steps.body: Choose WhatsApp from the list of connectable channels to launch the Meta authorization workspace.

steps.heading: Authenticate with your Meta Business account
steps.body: Log in with your Facebook business profile and grant HubSpot the OAuth permissions it needs, then create or select the Meta Business Manager account tied to your WhatsApp number.

steps.heading: Verify your business phone number
steps.body: Submit your active business phone number and complete the SMS or voice verification code Meta sends you.

steps.heading: Activate the shared inbox and test workflows
steps.body: Return to HubSpot, click Connect to activate the shared chat inbox, and test a pre-approved WhatsApp message template to confirm automated workflows are firing correctly.

faq.question: Do I need a verified Meta Business account to connect WhatsApp to HubSpot?
faq.answer: Yes, HubSpot requires a verified Meta Business Manager account matched to your WhatsApp Business phone number before the channel connection can be completed.

faq.question: Can I use my personal WhatsApp number for this integration?
faq.answer: No, the integration is built for WhatsApp Business numbers that go through Meta's business verification and OTP confirmation process.

faq.question: Why do I need to send pre-approved message templates?
faq.answer: WhatsApp Business requires templates to be pre-approved by Meta before they can be used in automated workflows, which HubSpot enforces to keep messaging compliant.

faq.question: What happens if my phone number verification code doesn't arrive?
faq.answer: You can typically request the code again as SMS or voice OTP from the same verification step; double-check the phone number entered is active and can receive calls or texts.
